token_expired: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue
token_invalid: Your session could not be verified. Sign in again to continue
forbidden: This account does not currently have access to that action
rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again shortly.
mail_not_configured: Mail delivery is not configured, so verification emails cannot be sent right now.
mail_delivery_failed: Failed to send email. Please try again later
file_not_found: The file does not exist or has been removed
file_too_large: The file is too large to upload
file_type_not_allowed: This file type is not allowed
file_upload_failed: Upload failed. Please try again later
upload_session_not_found: The upload session does not exist. Start the upload again
upload_session_expired: The upload session has expired. Start the upload again
chunk_upload_failed: A file chunk failed to upload. Please try again
resource_locked: This resource is currently locked. Please try again later
precondition_failed: The request precondition failed. Refresh and try again
upload_assembling: The file is still being assembled on the server. Please try again shortly
pending_activation: This account still needs email verification before it can be used.
contact_verification_invalid: This verification link is no longer available. It may already have been used
contact_verification_expired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one to continue
folder_not_found: The folder does not exist or has been removed
share_not_found: This share link does not exist or is no longer available
share_password_required: Enter the share password to continue
share_download_limit_reached: This share link has reached its download limit
unexpected_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later
error_page_default_title: This page could not finish loading.
error_page_default_description: An unexpected issue interrupted the page before it was fully ready.
error_page_default_suggestion: Go back to the previous page, then try the last action again.
error_page_sign_in_required_title: Please sign in again to continue to this page.
error_page_sign_in_required_description: The page is available, but the current session needs to be refreshed before it can open.
error_page_sign_in_required_suggestion: Return to a safe page, sign in again, and continue from there.
error_page_access_blocked_title: This page is not available with the current account.
error_page_access_blocked_description: The app reached the resource, but this account does not currently have the required access.
error_page_access_blocked_suggestion: Switch to an account with access, or contact an administrator if you need it.
error_page_route_missing_title: This address does not point to an available page.
error_page_route_missing_description: The address may be outdated, typed incorrectly, or mapped to a page that has already moved.
error_page_route_missing_suggestion: Double-check the address or jump back to a known location.
error_page_server_fault_title: The page could not finish loading.
error_page_server_fault_description: The request reached the service, but an upstream issue prevented the page from recovering.
error_page_server_fault_suggestion: Try again. If it keeps happening, check the backend or server logs.
error_page_missing_route_message: This address is not mapped to an available route.
